global.description: The ad features a prominent headline and call to action with promotional text in a visually appealing layout.
global.main_message: Promoting a special offer for FreshDash with a clear call to action.

elements.label: FreshDash UGC
elements.description: A bold, prominent text element at the top, featuring the words 'FreshDash UGC' in a large font.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: A large text area in the center that reads '2-for-1 tonight Free delivery over $15' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold button at the bottom of the ad with the text '$4.99 Try for free' designed to attract attention.
